isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_02}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_02}=1 ||
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_03}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_03}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_04}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_04}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_05}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_05}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_06}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_06}=1),
1,0)
